svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1284px; height: 1px; padding-top: 24px; margin-left: 180px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; max-height: 182px; overflow: hidden; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
div.p: Three independent CDK stacks sharing configuration via AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store:

ul.li: Stack 00: AgentCore Runtime + Memory with Strands multimodal agent, Claude Sonnet, and TwelveLabs video analysis.
Stack 01: WhatsApp via AWS End User Messaging Social - SNS triggers receiver Lambda, DynamoDB Stream tumbling window buffers messages, processor invokes AgentCore.
Stack 02: WhatsApp via Meta Cloud API - API Gateway webhook triggers receiver Lambda, same DynamoDB buffering pattern, processor invokes AgentCore.

div.p: Both Stack 01 and 02 use a tumbling window (3s) to aggregate rapid-fire messages into a single agent invocation, reducing token usage and costs.
